hooks.command: INPUT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|sudo |mvn deploy' && { echo 'Blocked dangerous command' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.java ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/app" && mvn compile -q -B --no-transfer-progress -ff 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; exit 0

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/app" && mvn test-compile -q -B --no-transfer-progress 2>&1 | tail -10; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo 'Compilation errors detected — please fix before continuing' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
